en_title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt — Songs of the Past Reveal Date Confirmed
cn_title: 《巫师3》资料片《旧时曲》科隆展揭晓
subtitle: 杰洛特新冒险明年登场

paragraphs.en: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt — Songs of the Past will be revealed at gamescom 2026 during Opening Night Live, CD Projekt has announced.
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt宣布，《巫师3：狂猎》资料片《旧时曲》将在2026年科隆游戏展开幕之夜直播中正式亮相。

paragraphs.en: Songs of the Past is the third expansion for CD Projekt’s fantasy masterpiece, and is due out in 2027 — 12 years after the original game came out and 11 years after the much-loved second expansion, Blood and Wine.
paragraphs.cn: 《旧时曲》是CD Projekt这部奇幻杰作的第三部资料片，计划于2027年推出——届时距离原作发售已过去12年，距离广受喜爱的第二部资料片《血与酒》也已过去11年。

paragraphs.en: CD Projekt said it is co-developing the expansion with Fool’s Theory, a team comprising "industry veterans" who worked on The Witcher 3. Here’s what we know so far.
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt表示，正与Fool’s Theory共同开发这部资料片；后者由参与过《巫师3》的「行业老兵」组成。以下是目前已知信息。

paragraphs.en: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt - Songs of the Past first details:

CD Projekt has suggested Songs of the Past will help set the stage for the upcoming The Witcher 4 . While telling a standalone story starring Geralt set after the events of The Witcher 3, the new adventure will also act as a prologue of sorts to The Witcher 4, according to the company's joint CEO Michał Nowakowski.
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt暗示，《旧时曲》将为即将推出的《巫师4》铺路。公司联席首席执行官Michał Nowakowski表示，这段新冒险发生在《巫师3》之后，讲述一段以杰洛特为主角的独立故事，同时也会在某种程度上充当《巫师4》的序章。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to investors in May, Nowakowski was questioned on how the expansion is being positioned in the franchise, why it will launch in 2027 after previously being expected this year, and whether any of CD Projekt's new trilogy of The Witcher games will also receive expansions, as The Witcher 3 has.
paragraphs.cn: Nowakowski今年5月面对投资者时，被问及这部资料片在系列中的定位、为何从原先预计的今年推迟至2027年，以及CD Projekt新的《巫师》三部曲是否也会像《巫师3》一样推出资料片。

paragraphs.en: "First and foremost, we really wanted to deliver a great experience to the fans, a really cool expansion that's going to make people happy that they can come back to The Witcher 3 setting," Nowakowski said, discussing why Songs of the Past was being made in the first place.
paragraphs.cn: 谈到为何制作《旧时曲》，Nowakowski说：「首先，我们真的想为粉丝带来出色体验，打造一部很棒的资料片，让大家能够开心地回到《巫师3》的世界。」

paragraphs.en: "Of course, indirectly, yes, it is a reminder [of the franchise for fans]. It is, in a way, a prologue, although it's not a prologue in a verbatim way of [being] a prologue for the actual The Witcher 4. Yes, you can look at it as it's a way to maintain certain chatter on The Witcher 3. All of those are side effects, additional side effects. The core thing for us, from our perspective, is really delivering a high-quality, fun experience to the existing fans of The Witcher."
paragraphs.cn: 「当然，间接来说，它确实会提醒粉丝这个系列。它在某种意义上是序章，但并不是字面意义上的《巫师4》正式序章。你也可以把它看作维持《巫师3》讨论热度的一种方式，不过这些都只是附带效果。对我们而言，核心仍是为现有《巫师》粉丝带来高质量、有趣的体验。」

paragraphs.en: "We had a moment where our plans assumed that Songs of the Past would be released this year," Nowakowski said, when questioned why the expansion was launching later than expected. "We decided together with the development team, that the game will be launching in 2027, to be honest, to achieve the best possible result from the consumer standpoint, which in the end, frankly speaking, is the only ultimate thing that really matters."
paragraphs.cn: 被问及资料片为何晚于预期推出时，Nowakowski说：「我们一度按《旧时曲》今年发售来规划。后来我们与开发团队共同决定改在2027年推出，说实话，是为了从消费者角度取得尽可能好的成果；归根结底，这才是唯一真正重要的事情。」

paragraphs.en: During a livestream aimed at The Witcher fans, CD Projekt gave a few further hints on the expansion's focus, teasing the importance of Geralt's new third sword — as glimpsed in a recent piece of artwork released to celebrate a springtime festival. Geralt's bard buddy Dandelion is also present.
paragraphs.cn: 在面向《巫师》粉丝的直播中，CD Projekt进一步暗示了资料片的重点：杰洛特新出现的第三把剑将十分重要。这把剑此前已在庆祝春季节日发布的画作中露面，杰洛特的吟游诗人好友丹德里恩也出现在其中。

paragraphs.en: "We won't give too much away right now because we want you to experience it as you play," senior community and social media manager Laura Beitzel teased during the 10th anniversary livestream designed to celebrate Blood and Wine.
paragraphs.cn: 高级社区与社交媒体经理Laura Beitzel在纪念《血与酒》10周年的直播中卖关子说：「现在我们不会透露太多，因为希望大家在游玩时亲自体验。」

paragraphs.en: "But as a few eagle-eyed people have already seen over the past 24 hours, there are some hints waiting for you on a very important evening in Witcher lore, Belleteyn Night, in our Belleteyn celebration that we shared a few weeks ago. So... keep looking for clues."
paragraphs.cn: 「不过，正如过去24小时里一些眼尖的人已经发现的那样，我们几周前分享的贝尔坦节庆祝内容中，在《巫师》传说里十分重要的贝尔坦之夜藏着一些提示。所以……继续寻找线索吧。」

paragraphs.en: Here, Beitzel is referencing a piece of artwork and a poem it posted on social media in April. It shows Geralt resting by a bonfire as Dandelion plays the lute while villagers dance. More importantly, though, it shows Geralt with a mysterious new sword — the same sword he's also holding in Songs of the Past's reveal artwork, which sports an unusual ornate curved crossguard.
paragraphs.cn: Beitzel指的是官方4月在社交媒体发布的一幅画和一首诗。画面中，杰洛特在篝火旁休息，丹德里恩弹奏鲁特琴，村民们翩翩起舞。更重要的是，杰洛特带着一把神秘新剑——正是《旧时曲》公开画作中他握着的那一把，拥有造型罕见、装饰华丽的弧形护手。

paragraphs.en: "So yes, Geralt is holding a sword," CD Projekt's Amelia Korzycka continued, referencing Songs of the Past's key artwork. "It is a very important sword for the story and you will get to know it when the game comes out. So a few more streams before that when [we] reveal it."
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt的Amelia Korzycka接着谈到《旧时曲》主视觉图：「没错，杰洛特手里拿着一把剑。它对故事非常重要，游戏推出后大家就会了解它。在正式揭晓之前，我们还会有几场直播。」

paragraphs.en: Beitzel also discussed the size of the expansion. "Songs of the Past will be aligned with what you're familiar with in Blood and Wine, and what you've come to experience and expect from us when we do our expansions," Beitzel explained. "It's an expansion, let's make it clear."
paragraphs.cn: Beitzel还谈到了资料片的规模：「《旧时曲》会与大家熟悉的《血与酒》保持一致，也符合各位对我们制作资料片时所体验和期待的内容。说清楚，它是一部真正的资料片。」

paragraphs.en: We also have confirmation that Songs of the Past will include more Gwent cards, and that CD Projekt was still working on cross-platform mod support for The Witcher 3, to launch at some point in the future.
paragraphs.cn: 官方还确认，《旧时曲》将加入更多昆特牌；CD Projekt也仍在开发《巫师3》的跨平台Mod支持，计划未来某个时间推出。

paragraphs.en: CD Projekt has yet to show Songs of the Past off in any way since it announced the expansion in May , so I expect we’ll see a trailer and, hopefully, some gameplay at ONL on August 25. The show kicks off at 11am PT / 2pm ET / 7pm UK time / 8pm CEST.
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt自5月公布《旧时曲》以来尚未展示任何实际内容，因此作者预计，8月25日的开幕之夜直播将带来预告片，或许还有实机演示。节目于太平洋时间上午11点、美国东部时间下午2点、英国时间晚7点、中欧夏令时晚8点开始。

paragraphs.en: The Witcher 3 recently hit an astonishing 65 million copies sold (it only seemed right that The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim hit the same sales milestone just a few months later ). CD Projekt is of course busy working on The Witcher 4, although there’s no release window yet. The Polish games company is also working on Cyberpunk 2 in what is an extremely busy development period.
paragraphs.cn: 《巫师3》最近创下惊人的65 million，即6500万份销量（几个月后《上古卷轴5：天际》也达到同一里程碑，倒也十分相称）。CD Projekt当然正忙于开发尚无发售窗口的《巫师4》，同时还在制作《赛博朋克2》，目前开发日程极为繁忙。

opus_summary: 《巫师3》第三部资料片《旧时曲》将在8月25日科隆游戏展开幕之夜直播亮相，计划2027年发售。故事以杰洛特为主角，规模对标《血与酒》，并将在某种程度上为《巫师4》铺路。
